examples: Many African tribes believe in reincarnation.
He recommended monotheism but believed in reincarnation.
Another little girl, believed to be the reincarnation of her grandmother, was obsessed with sewing.
Albright, says her sister Kathy Silva, is the reincarnation of their father Josef Korbel.
Tall, slim and rakishly elegant, he could be the American reincarnation of British actor David Niven.
